description_long: This is a compact, modern submachine gun-style rifle with a matte black finish and a robust, utilitarian design. The barrel is perforated with multiple circular vents for heat dissipation, and the front end is capped with a simple muzzle. The receiver is boxy and features a prominent charging handle on the right side, while the magazine is a detachable box type, inserted vertically in front of the trigger guard. The grip is ergonomic and angled, made from a polymer material, and the stock is a short, integrated pistol grip style, lacking a traditional shoulder stock. Iron sights are present on the top rail, and the overall construction suggests a blend of metal and polymer components for durability and reduced weight.
description: A compact, black submachine gun-style rifle with a vented barrel, box magazine, and ergonomic pistol grip. It features iron sights and a robust, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular barrel opening, vent holes, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the perforated barrel, charging handle, box magazine, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the receiver, magazine, and the top-mounted iron sights.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the vented barrel, magazine, and the overall compact profile of the rifle.
